chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Appln No.618 of 2025. ------------------------------------------------------------------- Date: Order with signature(s) of the Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 1. For Hearing of Case. 2. For Hearing of MA No.9929/2025. 02nd September, 2025. None present for the applicant. Mr. Tahir Hussain, A. P. G. Sindh. ************ None present for the applicant. Same was the positon on last date of hearing which shows that applicant has lost his interest to contest the instant Cr. Misc. Application, which is accordingly, dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith listed application[s]. JUDGE M.Zeeshan
